title: RE:mix
description: A modpack full of QoL and optimizations, made for our server RE:mix!
body:
This is the modpack for the Margarina server RE:mix.

## Features
- A handful of optimization mods to ensure a smooth experience.
- Voice chat with Simple Voice Chat.
- Console-like raised hotbar from Raised.
- Better food HUD (see additional hunger) from AppleSkin.
- Less cluttered F3.
- Enchantment descriptions.
- Inventory enhancements with Shulker Box Tooltip and MouseTweaks.
- Keep your chat history with MoreChatHistory.
- More animations with Not Enough Animations.
- Sound Physics Remastered for a good sounding gameplay.
- Minimap.
- Much more

## Included Texture Packs
- Custom panoramas (locations of RE:mix)

## Mod Removal Request
If you are a mod owner and want us to remove your mod from this modpack, feel free to email me at `adrianvictor+margarina@disroot.org`.
